title: Remove AI-slop eyebrow styling (uppercase + wide letter-spacing)
task: Audit the landing/sponsors UI for AI-slop typography tells and remove them: no uppercased label text and no wide positive letter-spacing (tracking-[0.18em] / tracking-wide). Keep negative tracking-tight on headings (that is intended, not slop).

stories.title: Strip uppercase + wide letter-spacing from all eyebrow labels
acceptanceCriteria: Zero occurrences of the `uppercase` utility remain anywhere under app/(home) (grep clean)
Zero occurrences of wide positive letter-spacing remain under app/(home): no tracking-[...em], tracking-wide, tracking-wider, tracking-widest, or inline letter-spacing/textTransform (grep clean)

All four affected eyebrow labels (section-heading.tsx shared eyebrow, works-with.tsx, sponsors/.../hero.tsx, sponsors/.../wall-of-love.tsx group label) are updated to normal case with normal letter-spacing while keeping their existing margin/size/color (font-mono text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground)
Negative heading kerning `tracking-tight` is preserved on h1/h2/h3 (9 files) — not removed
Eyebrow text strings read correctly in normal case; no other markup/behavior changed; no unused imports introduced
